title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: ostree bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for ostree is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: OSTree is a tool for managing bootable, immutable, versioned file system trees.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Rebase ostree to 2025.6 [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-113176)

full_text:
An update for ostree is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

OSTree is a tool for managing bootable, immutable, versioned file system trees.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Rebase ostree to 2025.6 [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-113176)
